heading: Limatations and Considerations
body:
- For multi-region deployments, you cannot combine legacy and port mapped
  endpoint services. You must create a port mapped endpoint service in each
  region in order for port mapped connection strings to work correctly.
  This limitation does not apply if you have a regionalized private endpoint.

- For multi-cloud clusters, if both legacy endpoint and port mapped endpoint services exist for a given region,
  you must delete the legacy endpoint service before you can connect to the port mapped endpoint service.
